title: How can I get Item Ids in custom action for integration recipe, when coupled with 'column changes'
excerpt:
I am trying to use a custom action I created with the built in trigger ‘when column changes’. 
How should I go about receiving the itemId of the item in my custom action. I have tried adding input field ‘ItemId’ and ‘Col…

posts.author: manishaghosh (MG)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to use a custom action I created with the built in trigger ‘when column changes’.

How should I go about receiving the itemId of the item in my custom action. I have tried adding input field ‘ItemId’ and ‘ColumnId’. But I am not getting the values in the req.body.

Right now I am only getting the BoardID which I have set as context. Can anyone please help me with this. How can I set up the custom action? Trying to create something like the following

image1123×472 14.6 KB

image619×320 12.4 KB

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: Add an input field for Item and get it from the trigger output.

posts.author: manishaghosh (MG)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, that’s what I was trying to do, I tried with both ColumnId and ItemId. But didn’t seem to work. However, I deleted the whole custom action and recreated it, and working fine now. Thanks for the help anyways. Appreciate it!
